overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene showing two characters sitting on a stone bench overlooking a gothic castle across a lake at night. The static camera captures the illuminated castle against a dramatic cloudy sky while the characters subtly interact and observe the view.

segments.scene_description: Two characters sit on a stone bench at a scenic overlook, facing a magnificent gothic castle illuminated against a dark cloudy night sky. The calm lake reflects the castle's warm lights while the characters remain seated, subtly turning their heads and gesturing as they observe the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a nocturnal landscape where two figures observe a distant gothic fortress. It begins with the characters seated on a stone bench at a scenic overlook, their silhouettes framed against a dark and cloudy night sky. As they subtly turn their heads and gesture toward the horizon, the camera captures the warm, golden illumination of the castle reflecting across the surface of a calm lake. The scene remains focused on this quiet interaction, emphasizing the stillness of the water and the dramatic contrast between the glowing architecture and the surrounding darkness.
